summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of WM-Sauna promotional blocks and model filtering features. All 10 requested features verified and working correctly.
passed_tests: Filter tabs present: 'Wszystkie', 'Beczki', 'Kwadro', 'Wiking' with data-testid attributes
Filter 'Beczki' correctly filters to 5 barrel sauna models
Filter 'Kwadro' correctly filters to 7 quadro sauna models
Filter 'Wiking' correctly filters to 1 viking sauna model
Model cards show two prices: electric heater (Zap icon) and wood heater (Flame icon)
Model cards show 'Cena za gotową saunę z piecem. Cena zawiera VAT.' text
Model cards show 'GOTOWA, ZMONTOWANA SAUNA' badge on image
Model cards do NOT show discount badges or crossed-out prices (discounts only in StockSaunas section)
Model detail modal shows two prices with heater info and VAT text
Model detail modal shows 'GOTOWA, ZMONTOWANA SAUNA' badge
PromoFeatures section exists with 4 USP blocks: 'Gotowa sauna w 5-10 dni', 'Skandynawskie drewno klasy A+', 'Gwarancja i serwis', 'Doradca pomoże dobrać'
PromoBanner section exists with 'zniżka do 10%' text
PromoBanner CTA button 'Przejdź do kalkulatora' scrolls to calculator section
Compare table shows two price rows: 'Cena (z piecem elektrycznym)' and 'Cena (z piecem na drewno)'
critical_code_review_comments: Console warnings about HTML hydration errors: '<span> cannot be a child of <tr>' and similar - these are caused by React's dynamic rendering with map() inside table elements. While not breaking functionality, should be addressed for cleaner HTML structure.
seed_data_creation: None - tests use existing API data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 user-requested changes have been implemented and verified: 1) PromoFeatures (4 USP blocks) and PromoBanner (10% discount promo) sections added after models section. 2) Model filter tabs working (Wszystkie/Beczki/Kwadro/Wiking). 3) No discounts on model cards (discounts only in StockSaunas section). 4) 'Cena zawiera VAT' text on cards. 5) 'GOTOWA, ZMONTOWANA SAUNA' badge on cards. 6) Two prices shown (electric heater + wood heater) fetched from /api/sauna/prices API. The site is in Polish. Filter tabs have data-testid='filter-all', 'filter-beczka', 'filter-kwadro', 'filter-wiking'. Promo sections have data-testid='promo-features' and 'promo-banner'.

model_filter_tabs.details: 4 filter tabs (Wszystkie, Beczki, Kwadro, Wiking) correctly filter 13 models by type

two_prices_on_cards.details: Cards show basePrice + electric heater price and basePrice + wood heater price with icons

no_discounts_on_cards.details: No discount badges or crossed-out prices on model cards (discounts only in StockSaunas section)

vat_text_on_cards.details: 'Cena za gotową saunę z piecem. Cena zawiera VAT.' displayed on all model cards

ready_sauna_badge.details: 'GOTOWA, ZMONTOWANA SAUNA' badge displayed on model card images

promo_features_section.details: 4 USP blocks with icons: delivery, wood quality, warranty, advisor

promo_banner_section.details: 'zniżka do 10%' promo banner with CTA button that scrolls to calculator

model_detail_modal.details: Shows two prices, VAT text, and ready sauna badge

compare_table.details: Shows two price rows for electric and wood heater
